analysis.semantic_summary: This parser processes PingFederate authentication logs, focusing on user authentication events and access management. It standardizes authentication-related data including user logins, client information, session details, and token management into OCSF-compliant format for security monitoring and analysis.
optimization_opportunities: Implement error handling for timestamp parsing
analysis.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: pingfederate-latest 
-- OCSF Class: Authentication (3002)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T12:25:50.089981

-- Pre-declare locals for performance
local type = type
local tonumber = tonumber
local os_time = os.time
local string_format = string.format

-- Validation helper functions
local function validate_ip(ip)
    if not ip then return false end
    local parts = {ip:match("^(%d+)%.(%d+)%.(%d+)%.(%d+)$")}
    if #parts ~= 4 then return false end
    for _, part in ipairs(parts) do
        local n = tonumber(part)
        if not n or n < 0 or n > 255 then return false end
    end
    return true
end

local function parse_timestamp(ts)
    if not ts then return nil end
    local epoch = tonumber(ts)
    if epoch then return epoch end
    -- Add ISO8601 parsing if needed
    return nil
end

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant output with constant fields
    local output = {
        -- Core OCSF classification
        class_uid = 3002,
        class_name = "Authentication",
        category_uid = 3, 
        category_name = "Identity & Access Management",
        type_uid = 300201,
        type_name = "Authentication: Logon",
        activity_id = 1,
        activity_name = "Logon",

        -- Metadata
        metadata = {
            product = {
                name = "PingFederate",
                vendor_name = "PingIdentity"
            },
            version = "1.0.0"
        }
    }

    -- Timestamp handling with validation
    local timestamp = parse_timestamp(record.timestamp)
    if timestamp then
        output.time = timestamp
    else
        output.time = os_time() * 1000
    end

    -- User information
    if record.username then
        output.user = {
            name = record.username
        }
    end

    -- Source endpoint
    if record.client_ip and validate_ip(record.client_ip) then
        output.src_endpoint = {
            ip = record.client_ip
        }
    end

    -- Session information
    if record.session_id then
        output.session = {
            uid = record.session_id
        }
    end

    -- Application details
    if record.client_id then
        output.actor = {
            application = {
                name = record.client_id
            }
        }
    end

    -- Authorization scope
    if record.scope then
        output.authorization = {
            scope = record.scope
        }
    end

    -- Direct field mappings with validation
    local direct_mappings = {
        status = "status",
        message = "message",
        log_level = "severity",
        logger_name = "class_name"
    }

    for source, target in pairs(direct_mappings) do
        if record[source] then
            output[target] = record[source]
        end
    end

    -- Extension metadata
    local extension_fields = {
        adapter_id = true,
        token_type = true,
        transaction_id = true
    }

    for field in pairs(extension_fields) do
        if record[field] then
            if not output.metadata.extension then
                output.metadata.extension = {}
            end
            output.metadata.extension[field] = record[field]
        end
    end

    -- Final validation
    if not output.class_uid or output.class_uid == 0 then
        return nil, "Invalid class_uid"
    end

    return output
end

setup_steps: Deploy LUA module to Observo.ai parser directory
